items.title: Sixth person dies after shooting at youth welfare centre in Germany
items.dek: Four women and a man were shot dead at the scene while a sixth person died in hospital, police say.
items.body: Four women and a man were shot dead at the scene while a sixth person died in hospital, police say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with rights
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump's appeal of E Jean Carroll's sexual abuse case
items.dek: The decision means the US president will now have to pay her the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.
items.body: The decision means the US president will now have to pay her the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.
items.author: IriLine Desk
